metadata.title: Condo Ágora - Clear Decisions, Real Improvements
metadata.description: The platform that transforms your building management. Propose, vote, and decide transparently and democratically.

hero.badge: The new way to manage your community
hero.description: The platform that transforms your building management. Propose, vote, and decide transparently and democratically.

logoCloud.title: Trusted by over 200 buildings across Uruguay

problems.label: The Problem
problems.title: Tired of endless debates in the group chat?
problems.description: Buildings face communication problems that affect harmony and community progress. It's time for change.

lost.title: Lost proposals
lost.description: Important ideas get lost in the chaos of WhatsApp groups.

transparency.title: Lack of transparency
transparency.description: Decisions without consulting everyone generate distrust.

slow.title: Slow processes
slow.description: Months of debates without reaching concrete agreements.

features.label: Features
features.title: Tools designed for community harmony
features.description: Everything you need to manage your building efficiently and transparently.

proposals.title: Centralized Proposals
proposals.description: All proposals organized in one place. Easy to create, comment, and track.

voting.title: Priority Voting
voting.description: Intelligent voting system that allows prioritizing the most important proposals.

transparency.title: Total Transparency
transparency.description: Clear and accessible reports for all community members.

roles.title: Roles and Delegation
roles.description: Flexible permission management for different types of users.

howItWorks.label: How It Works
howItWorks.title: Simple, fast, and effective
howItWorks.description: In four simple steps, transform your community management.

create.title: Create your community
create.description: Register your building and add all residents in minutes.

propose.title: Propose improvements
propose.description: Any member can create clear and structured proposals.

vote.title: Vote and decide
vote.description: Democratic voting system with transparent results.

execute.title: Execute and track
execute.description: Monitor the progress of approved improvements.

testimonials.label: Testimonials
testimonials.title: What our communities say
testimonials.description: Over 200 buildings already trust Condo Ágora.

maria.name: María González
maria.quote: Condo Ágora completely transformed our communication. Votes that used to take weeks are now resolved in days.

carlos.name: Carlos Rodríguez
carlos.quote: Finally I can see exactly how the community's money is being spent. The transparency is incredible.

ana.name: Ana Martínez
ana.quote: I manage 3 buildings and this tool saves me hours of work every week. Essential.

cta.title: Ready to transform your building management?
cta.description: Join the communities that are already making smarter and more transparent decisions.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.description: Choose the plan that best fits your community. All plans include unlimited proposals and votes.

free.name: Free
free.description: Perfect for small buildings getting started

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: For growing communities that need more

footer.description: Clear decisions, real improvements. The platform that transforms your condominium's community management.
footer.tagline: Made with ❤️ for more united communities

health.title: System Health
health.subtitle: Monitor the health of your API services
health.someIssues: ⚠ Some services may be experiencing issues

overview.noMembersYet: No members yet. Invite your first team member to get started.
overview.completeSteps: Complete these steps to set up your community.
overview.noPropertiesYet: No properties yet. Add your first one!

properties.title: Properties
properties.notInOrg: You are not part of any organization.
properties.noPropertiesMessage: Create your first property to start managing your community's units and houses.
properties.notFoundMessage: The property you are looking for does not exist.
properties.noResidentsAssigned: No residents assigned to this property yet.
properties.confirmRemoveResident: Are you sure you want to remove this resident?
properties.noVoterAssigned: No designated voter assigned. Assign a voter so this unit can participate in voting sessions.

committee.title: Committee
committee.subtitle: Board members & residents of {orgName}
committee.notInOrg: You are not part of any organization.
committee.noOtherMembers: No other members yet. Invite users from the Settings page.

proposals.title: Proposals
proposals.subtitle: Community improvement ideas from residents
proposals.noMatchHint: Try adjusting the filters to see more results.
proposals.noProposalsHint: Be the first to suggest an improvement for the community!
proposals.author: Author
proposals.notFoundMessage: The proposal you are looking for does not exist.
proposals.submitForReviewHint: Opens the proposal for community review
proposals.rejectReasonPrompt: Please provide a reason for rejecting this proposal.
proposals.rejectReasonPlaceholder: e.g. Budget constraints, outside scope of community rules...
proposals.mustBeInOrg: You must be a member of an organization to create proposals.
proposals.newProposalDescription: Submit a community improvement idea. Save as draft to continue editing later, or submit for review to open it for community discussion.
proposals.titlePlaceholder: e.g. Replace lobby lighting with LED fixtures
proposals.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the problem you're trying to solve, the proposed solution, and the expected benefits for the community...
proposals.descriptionHint: Minimum 10 characters. Be specific about the issue and proposed solution.
proposals.descriptionMinLength: Description must be at least 10 characters.

proposalVote.thresholdHint: Percentage of YES votes needed for approval
proposalVote.closeVoteConfirm: Are you sure you want to close this vote? If the threshold is not met, the proposal will be rejected.
proposalVote.noHouseAssigned: You must be assigned to a unit with a designated voter to vote.

voting.title: Voting Sessions
voting.subtitle: Rank proposals to determine community priorities
voting.noSessionsHint: Create a session to start collecting community votes.
voting.notOpenYet: This voting session is not open yet.
voting.mustBeAssignedUnit: You must be assigned to a unit to vote.
voting.dragInstruction: Drag or use the arrows to rank proposals from most important (#1) to least important.
voting.noVotesYet: No votes have been cast yet.
voting.proposalsToVote: Proposals to Vote On * (select from VOTING status proposals)
voting.noVotingProposals: No proposals in VOTING status. Move proposals to VOTING first.

reports.title: Reports
reports.subtitle: Community metrics, financial overview, and participation data.
reports.selectClosedSession: Select a closed voting session to view its participation report.
reports.ofUnitsParticipated: of units participated in the most recent voting session

archive.title: Archive
archive.subtitle: Browse completed projects with their outcomes and details.
archive.noProjectsHint: Completed projects will appear here once proposals reach the completed stage.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.noNotificationsHint: You'll be notified about proposals, comments, and announcements here.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your organization, members, and preferences.
settings.membersCount: {count} {count, plural, one {member} other {members}} in your organization
settings.name: Name
settings.duplicateInvitation: An invitation is already pending for this email.
settings.existingUserNotified: User already exists. An in-app notification was sent.
settings.invitationAccepted: Invitation accepted! Welcome to the organization.
settings.onlyAdminsCanEdit: Only administrators can edit organization details.
settings.editComingSoon: Organization profile editing will be available in a future update.
settings.noOrgYet: You do not belong to any organization yet. Please ask an administrator to invite you.
settings.removeMemberConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove {name} from the organization? This will also delete their account.

announcements.title: Announcements
announcements.noAnnouncements: No announcements yet. Post one to keep your community informed.

states.errorMessage: We ran into an unexpected error. Please try again.
